---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

Describe the problem or limitation you're running into. What can't you do today?

> Example: *"I can't filter output by log level, so I have to scroll through thousands of lines to find errors."*

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible.

## Use Case

Describe who benefits from this feature and in what workflow.

> Example: *"Python developers using Ruff who want their AI assistant to focus only on error-level messages."*

## Alternatives Considered

Are there workarounds or alternative approaches you've considered?

## Implementation Ideas (optional)

If you have ideas about how this could be implemented, share them here. Even rough ideas help!

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or links to related issues or discussions.
